subject: Outlook stuck on Loading Profile
description: Outlook desktop spins on 'Loading Profile' for ten-plus minutes after login.

ts_steps.title: Related processes
ts_steps.action: End Lync/UcMapi if hung; close new Teams if it integrates MAPI.

ts_steps.title: Binary search add-ins
ts_steps.action: File → Options → Add-ins → COM Add-ins — disable half, restart Outlook, repeat.

ts_steps.title: Trust Center add-ins
ts_steps.action: Trust Center → Add-ins — review disabled or managed add-ins.

ts_steps.title: New Mail profile
ts_steps.action: Control Panel → Mail → Show Profiles → Add — create new profile.

ts_steps.title: Add account to new profile
ts_steps.action: Launch Outlook, choose new profile, add Microsoft 365 / Exchange.

ts_steps.title: Migrate PST if needed
ts_steps.action: File → Open & Export — import legacy PST after mail flows.

ts_steps.title: Rename old OST
ts_steps.action: With Outlook closed, rename .ost to .old for old profile to force rebuild — warn re-download.

ts_steps.title: ScanPST/OST tools
ts_steps.action: If approved, run Inbox Repair per Microsoft for PST path.

ts_steps.title: Capture builds
ts_steps.action: Note Office and Windows 11 build for engineering if all profiles fail.

internal_information: Profile corrupt, add-in loop, OST damage. Classic Outlook assumed unless tenant is new-Outlook-only.
